---
name: Game idea
about: Propose a new phonics game (no code required)
title: "[GAME IDEA] "
labels: game-idea
assignees: ''
---

**Game name**

**Phonics skill it teaches**
e.g. CVC short vowels / digraphs SH CH / long vowel CVCe / sight words

**Target age range**
e.g. Ages 4–6

**How the game works (brief description)**
A few sentences. What does the child do? What does the correct answer look like?

**Why this skill needs a game**
What gap does this fill in the current collection?

**Any research or classroom experience behind this idea?**
Optional but very helpful.
